title: 1 Gang 16mm Metal Pattress Box – Surface Mount with Earth Terminals for Electrical Faceplates (1)
features: 16mm Depth: Compact size for tight spaces, ideal for low-profile surface installations.
Pre-Fitted Earth Terminals: Ensures safe and compliant electrical connections, adhering to standards.
Durable Metal Construction: Strong and sturdy, offering longevity and reliable protection for electrical components.
Surface Mount Design: Easy installation on walls and surfaces without the need for cavity fitting.
Versatile Application: Suitable for switches, sockets, and other electrical faceplates in home, office, and industrial setups.
description: This 1 Gang 16mm Metal Pattress Box is the perfect solution for surface-mounted electrical installations, offering a secure and sturdy housing for switches, sockets, and other faceplates. With its compact 16mm depth, it’s ideal for spaces with limited clearance. The back box comes pre-fitted with earth terminals, ensuring safety and compliance with electrical standards. Constructed from durable metal, it is designed for long-lasting use in both residential and commercial environments.
